metadata.description: Register an account on the Parks Canada reservation portal, search for a 3-night campsite at Banff National Park (2 persons, electrical), select an available site and submit the reservation

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account

instruction: Register an account on the Parks Canada reservation portal, search for a 3-night campsite at Banff National Park (2 persons, electrical), select an available site and submit the reservation
